title: Update .NET SDK from 8.0.100 to 8.0.406
body:
## Summary

Updates the .NET SDK version in `global.json` from **8.0.100** to **8.0.406**.

## Changes

- `global.json`: Updated SDK version from `8.0.100` → `8.0.406`

## Why

.NET SDK 8.0.100 is outdated and multiple patches have been released since. Bumping to 8.0.406 ensures the build uses a current SDK with all available fixes. The `rollForward: latestMinor` policy is preserved, so it will continue to roll forward to the latest installed 8.0.x SDK.
